_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: genetic ablation of Fak significantly decreased DRG volume in a gene dose–dependent manner
details: Genetic ablation of Fak significantly decreased DRG volume in a gene dose-dependent manner when crossed with Nf2 mice
